zh.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Peshale於大約1214年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，她的父親Stephen de Peshale25歲，母親Mrs. Stephen De Peshale25歲。她於大約1229年與John Swynnerton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年之前在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓。

zh-hans.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Peshale于大约1214年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，她的父亲Stephen de Peshale25岁，母亲Mrs. Stephen De Peshale25岁。她于大约1229年与John Swynnerton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年之前在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peshale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from any of more than two dozen places called Penhale in Cornwall, or from places of similar name in Wales, such as Pennal (Merioneths), or from Penheale in Egloskerry (Cornwall). The Cornish places named Penhale derive from Middle Cornish * pen hal ‘moor’s head, marsh’s head’ ( pen ‘head, top, end; promontory’, hal ‘moor, marsh’); Pennal (Merioneths) has the same meaning. Penheale derives from Middle Cornish pen + hel ‘hall’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Peshale was born about 1214, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen de Peshale, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Stephen De Peshale, was 25. She married John Swynnerton about 1229. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1254, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Peshale est née environ 1214, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de Peshale, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Stephen De Peshale, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Swynnerton environ 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1254, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Peshale um 1214 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen de Peshale 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Stephen De Peshale 25. Sie hat um 1229 John Swynnerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1254 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Peshale è nata il circa 1214 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Stephen de Peshale, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Stephen De Peshale, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Swynnerton circa 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1254, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Peshaleが約1214年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Stephen de Peshaleは25歳，母Mrs. Stephen De Peshaleは25歳であった。約1229年にJohn Swynnertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Peshale(이)가 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Peshale(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Stephen De Peshale(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1229년 John Swynnerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Peshale nasceu aproximadamente 1214, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen de Peshale, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Stephen De Peshale, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Swynnerton aproximadamente 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1254, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Peshale родилась около 1214 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen de Peshale было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Stephen De Peshale, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Swynnerton около 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1254 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия.
